headline: Trump imposes 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico; 20% on China
impact_hint: Risk-off; equities lower, gold bid, USD mixed

headline: ECB cuts rates 25bp to 2.50%; Lagarde sounds cautious on trade
impact_hint: EUR softer initially, then bid as terminal rate priced higher

headline: UK GDP unexpectedly contracts 0.1% in January
impact_hint: GBP weaker, gilts bid

headline: US CPI prints 2.8% YoY, cooler than expected 2.9%
impact_hint: Stocks rally on softer print, USD softer

headline: Fed holds rates steady; dot plot still shows two cuts in 2025
impact_hint: Stocks rally, USD softer, gold bid

headline: BoE holds Bank Rate at 4.50%, vote 8-1
impact_hint: GBP modestly higher

headline: Reeves Spring Statement: fiscal headroom restored at GBP 9.9bn
impact_hint: Gilts initially bid then sold as growth forecasts cut

headline: LIBERATION DAY: Trump announces sweeping reciprocal tariffs on every major trading partner
impact_hint: Massive risk-off; equities crash globally, safe havens bid

headline: China retaliates with 34% tariffs on all US goods; EU mulls response
impact_hint: Equity selloff accelerates; gold rips

headline: S&P 500 closes down 6%, worst two-day drop since March 2020
impact_hint: VIX spikes above 45

headline: Asian markets crash on open; Nikkei -8%, Hang Seng -13%
impact_hint: Contagion fears, JPY safe-haven bid

headline: US Treasury yields surge as bond vigilantes hit; 10Y above 4.5%
impact_hint: Bonds AND stocks selling - confidence shock

headline: TRUMP PAUSES TARIFFS for 90 days; markets explode higher
impact_hint: S&P 500 +9.5% on the day, largest gain since 2008

headline: US CPI prints 2.4% YoY, lowest in months
impact_hint: Reinforces rally; rate cut expectations rebuild

headline: ECB cuts rates 25bp again to 2.25%; signals more easing if tariffs persist
impact_hint: EUR softer, European equities recover

headline: ASML beats Q1 earnings but cuts FY guidance citing tariff uncertainty
impact_hint: ASML lower; broader semis under pressure

headline: US Q1 GDP contracts 0.3% - first negative print since 2022
impact_hint: Stagflation fears resurface briefly

headline: Fed holds rates steady; Powell warns tariffs could be stagflationary
impact_hint: Stocks dip, USD bid

headline: BoE cuts Bank Rate to 4.25%, vote 5-2-2 (split MPC)
impact_hint: GBP softer, gilts bid, FTSE supported

headline: US-UK trade deal announced; 10% baseline tariff retained, autos and steel carve-outs
impact_hint: GBP and UK equities rally

headline: US-China announce 90-day tariff truce; mutual reduction to 10%
impact_hint: Massive risk-on; equities and oil rally, gold sold

headline: S&P 500 turns positive for 2025
impact_hint: Sentiment fully restored

headline: Moody's downgrades US sovereign rating from Aaa to Aa1
impact_hint: Bonds dip, gold bid, equities shrug

headline: US Court of International Trade rules most Trump tariffs illegal
impact_hint: Stocks pop in after-hours
